And don't miss the new TREASURE PASS season kicking off July 1!

Update regularly so you never miss fresh levels, events & surprises!

title: Coin Master - Board Adventure
notes: Welcome to Coin Master: Board Adventure, where every dice roll takes you closer to riches, revenge, and all-out fun! Collect coins, attack villages, build your empire, and explore wild new boards full of surprises. It's not just a board game - it's a bold adventure!

title: Project Makeover
notes:
A passionate chef is stuck on the sidelines with her truck out of commission! Help get her skills on the road just in time for our summer events! Cross the finish lines and celebrate with our Summertime Sale!

-NEW EVENT: Racing Ranking!
-NEW MAKEOVER: Tasting Success!
-RETURNING EVENT: Cruising for First!
-NEW SALE: Summertime Sale!
-60 new levels!

title: AFK Journey
notes:
Major Updates
1. Adding a new Hypogean hero: Lamentis, the Cosmic Hellion, who will be released after the version update. You can acquire him through Stargaze Station and Guild Store.
2. Adding new Side Quests, Twilight Accord and Real-Life Drama, which unlock after completing the new Main Quest: King's Sword.
3. Adding Gunnar's exclusive story, Firepower Fanatic, to Starry Tales.
4. Adding Level 2 Enhance Force for Lumont and Rowan.
5. Adding Zorya's and Pippa's Soul Sigils to the Season Store.
